content.problemStatement:
Shamili has an array A=[A0,A1,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąí1]A = [A_0, A_1, \dots, A_{N-1}]A=[A0‚Äč,A1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚ąí1‚Äč] of length NNN. She painted each element of this array in either Black or White.

She allows you to right rotate the values in array AAA by any value kkk. In other words, let BBB be the resulting array after right rotating AAA by kkk, then Bi=A(i‚ąík+n)(modN)B_i = A_{(i-k+n) \pmod{N}}Bi‚Äč=A(i‚ąík+n)(modN)‚Äč where B0B_0B0‚Äč and A0A_0A0‚Äč are the first elements in the arrays AAA and BBB respectively). Note that when you rotate the array AAA, their colors won't get rotated and only the values in it get rotated. For example, let the array AAA be [3,2,7,6][3,2,7,6][3,2,7,6] and their colors be [[[Black, Black, White, White]]]. Right rotating AAA by 222 will give you the array [7,6,3,2][7,6,3,2][7,6,3,2] with colors [[[Black, Black, White, White]]].

Let maxbmaxbmaxb be the maximum value among all the elements that are painted in Black and minwminwminw be the minimum value among all the elements that are painted in White. Shamili asked you to find the maximum value of maxb‚ąíminwmaxb - minwmaxb‚ąíminw after right rotating the array aaa at most once.

It is guaranteed that at least one element in the array is colored in Black and at least one element is colored in White.


Input Format

The first line of input contains an integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. TTT test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains the integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN integers A0,A1,A2,...,AN‚ąí1A_0, A_1, A_2, ..., A_{N-1}A0‚Äč,A1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,...,AN‚ąí1‚Äč. Note that AAA is 0-indexed.
The third line of each test case contains a string CCC of size NNN representing the color of each element. (Ci=‚ÄėB‚ÄėC_i = `B`Ci‚Äč=‚ÄėB‚Äė if the ithi^{th}ith element in array AAA is painted in Black color and Ci=‚ÄėW‚ÄėC_i = `W`Ci‚Äč=‚ÄėW‚Äė if the ithi^{th}ith element is painted in White color). Note that CCC is also 0-indexed, i.e. the first character of CCC is C0C_0C0‚Äč and the last character is CN‚ąí1C_{N-1}CN‚ąí1‚Äč.


Output Format
For each test case, output the maximum possible value of maxb‚ąíminwmaxb-minwmaxb‚ąíminw.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 15‚čÖ10515 \cdot 10^515‚čÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: When we right rotate the array by 111, the resulting array will be [6,5,1,2][6,5,1,2][6,5,1,2]. Now the maximum value in Black elements is 666 (maxbmaxbmaxb) and minimum value in White elements (minwminwminw) is 222. Therefore, the answer will be 6‚ąí2=46-2 = 46‚ąí2=4. It can be shown that this is the maximum result possible.


Test case 222: We can convert the given array to [9,3,1,8,2][9,3,1,8,2][9,3,1,8,2]. So, the maximum value is 9‚ąí1=89-1 = 89‚ąí1=8.
